class.name: UtilityAISensorGroup
class.brief_description: Aggregate input from several [UtilityAISensor]s or [UtilityAISensorGroup]s for a higher-level input to the [UtilityAIConsiderations].
class.description: Used to aggregate input from several [UtilityAISensor]s (or [UtilityAISensorGroup]s) for a higher-level input to the [UtilityAIConsiderations] nodes. It should be added as child nodes of a [UtilityAIAgent].

members.member: A choice of how the sensors and sensor groups that are childs of the node are aggregated. Can be one of the following: [code]Sum:0,Min:1,Max:2,Mean:3,Multiply:4,FirstNonZero:5[/code].
This inverts the group sensor_value by calculating: [code]sensor_value = 1.0 - sensor_value[/code]. It is applied after all the child nodes have been evaluated.
